name: Oak Hill Equestrian Center
description: Premier boarding facility offering full board and pasture board. Boarding available with stalls, daily turnout, and two arenas. Board rate from $700/month.

name: Pegasus Riding Academy
description: We offer riding lessons and horse training for all levels. Dressage and hunter/jumper coaching with weekly clinics.

name: Sleepy Hollow Farm
description: A quiet 40-acre farm with several stalls, a barn, and a riding arena. Family owned for 20 years.

name: Marion Feed & Supply
description: Your local feed store. Horse feed, hay for sale, grain, shavings and bedding. Bulk forage available.

name: Citra Pasture Holdings LLC
description: Land management and cattle grazing operation in north Marion County.

name: Williston Hoof Care
description: Certified farrier providing horseshoeing, corrective shoeing, and barefoot trimming across Levy and Marion counties.
